cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a dental clinic around acute pain consultation using trust-first messaging and a booking CTA
input.offer_info: acute-pain route, no diagnosis or cure claims, clear scope framing
input.audience_segment: local users dealing with tooth pain, wisdom tooth issues and urgent dental concerns

mustInclude: trust and process proof before price
CTA that collects tooth position and timing

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a cleaning and checkup booking route
input.audience_segment: users preparing for routine cleaning, checkups and oral maintenance

mustInclude: boundary that this is a fit-check route

input.strategy_route: Write copy for returning-customer recheck reminders
input.offer_info: repeat-visit route with timing and scope check
input.audience_segment: existing patients rebooking for rechecks, orthodontic visits or repeat evaluation

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write copy for trust-sensitive first-time visitors
input.offer_info: store-proof-first route with no zero-risk phrasing
input.audience_segment: users worried about pain, doctor skill and treatment reliability

mustInclude: CTA that collects concern and visit window
